auth_notes: Requires a 'token' parameter which can be passed as a query parameter or within the JSON body depending on the endpoint. Most commonly passed as a query string in the HTTP Request node.
gotchas: The API requires a 'test_mode' boolean to be set to true during development to avoid consuming paid credits.
Webhook payloads are sent as POST requests with a flat structure, which may require mapping in n8n.
Template IDs must be pre-configured in the eSignatures.io dashboard before they can be triggered via API.
client_must_provide: Signer email addresses and placeholder field names
research_notes: Implementation requires the HTTP Request node. For sending documents, use POST to https://esignatures.io/api/contracts/create_from_template. Webhooks are configured globally in the eSignatures.io settings to point to an n8n Webhook node, allowing for real-time updates when a document is viewed or signed.

effort_recommendation.rationale: Implementation requires the HTTP Request node. For sending documents, use POST to https://esignatures.io/api/contracts/create_from_template. Webhooks are configured globally in the eSignatures.io settings to point to an n8n Webhook node, allowing for real-time updates when a document is viewed or signed.
